title: verbesina sordescens var. sordescens
intro: Verbesina sordescens var. sordescens, also known as the Yellow Crownbeard or Yellow Ironweed, is a plant species in the daisy family native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, providing relief and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Verbesina sordescens var. sordescens is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
